ul.li: Include codes fromhttp://loinc.org version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where CLASS = LP7787-7 (CLIN)

publisher.value: HL7 International / Payer/Provider Information Exchange Work Group

name.value: HL7 International / Payer/Provider Information Exchange Work Group

description.value: This value set includes All LOINC codes defined as type "clinical," therefore excluding laboratory tests, survey instruments, and claims documents. This includes observables such as vital signs, hemodynamics, intake/output, EKG, obstetric ultrasound, and cardiac echo, and includes discrete and narrative diagnostic observations and reports.

copyright.value: This material contains content from LOINC (http://loinc.org).
